title: Talking Bubbles!
description: Talking bubbles is a datapack combined with a resourcepack that makes villagers able to talk to each other!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63dd7fdebb29153edadd8f6714fdc8c75e4edc3b.png)

## **NOTE, THIS IS A DATAPACK ONLY! YOU ALSO NEED RESOURCEPACK FOR TALKING BUBBLES TO FUNCTION PROPERLY!**

- **Remember to reload at the beginning because this datapack adds its own Scoreboards which are automatically added!**

Talking bubbles is a very fun and creative datapack for minecraft that allows the Player to imagine what our long-nosed Villager friend wants to tell us!

For this moment, Villager can talk about: Weather, Entities nearby, About their mood, Fear during Raid, Winning after Raid, and of course Random nonsense! Like what Villagers often do!

- What could be funnier than seeing a Villager running afraid away from a Parrot!



This is the first version of the datapack, it has already been tested but there is a chance that it will not work as it should, so please give me feedback then while I am preparing the next update!

 #### - Lifeely
